text.title: Negative Result Discipline for ML Spikes Core Rules

rule.statement: Every closed negative spike MUST capture hypothesis + outcome + retry-condition in exactly three lines.
rule.rationale: Longer artefacts decay; three lines stay readable.

rule.statement: Each artefact MUST be tagged from the agreed taxonomy AND indexed in the team's search surface.
rule.rationale: Untagged artefacts are unfindable; finding them is the point.

rule.statement: Retry-condition MUST be a concrete observable (e.g. 'when E5-v2 ships' or 'when GPU price drops 50%').
rule.rationale: Vague conditions ('when conditions improve') are useless.

rule.statement: Pre-spike planning MUST search prior negatives by tag before kickoff.
rule.rationale: Without search the artefacts exist but are not consulted.

rule.statement: Negative-result artefact MUST be produced when spike cost (eng-time + GPU) exceeded $200.
rule.rationale: Below the floor the ceremony exceeds the value.
